To Have Predeceased Elaine D. Cahn;
Constructive Fraud; And
Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Perry for and with Benjamin Cahn (via zoom). Co-trustee.
Yona Conzevoy for and with Rachel Cahn (via zoom). Co-trustee.
Michael Freeman for and with Tara Cahn (in person). Co-trustee.
Deborah Fox for and with Melissa Chung (via zoom).

Discussion was held regarding the contested matter to be appointed as trustee, that both parties cannot agree on conducting mediation, that there is the looming tax in Israel, and that whether this matter should be heard after the motion hearing set for April 8, 2026.

The Court orders a temporary suspension to all three trustees, that temporarily appoint Melissa Chung as the temporary trustee.

The Court shall issue Breslin order.

The Court orders temporary trustee to post a bond of $8,809,000. Mr. Freedman to prepare an order and circulate to opposing counsel for review.

The matters are continued to June 2, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
